area.title: Mary Cassatt - Afternoon Tea Party
area.content: 1891. Drypoint, color aquatint, and gold paint, 17 x 12 in. (43.2 x 30.5 cm) (sheet). SLAM

area.title: Eugène Delacroix - Lion of Atlas
area.content: 1829. Lithograph, 13 x 18 1/4 in. (33 x 46.4 cm). SLAM

area.title: Franz Marc - Tiger
area.content: 1912. Woodcut, state i/ii. Image: 7 7/8 x 9 7/16 in. (20 x 24 cm); sheet: 10 13/16 x 15 9/16 in. (27.5 x 39.5 cm). SLAM

area.title: Jean-François Millet - Woman Carding Wool
area.content: 1855. Etching, plate: 10 1/16 x 6 7/8 in. (25.6 x 17.5 cm); sheet: 14 x 9 1/4 in. (35.6 x 23.5 cm). SLAM

area.title: Marcantonio Raimondi - Two Women with the Signs of Libra and Scorpio
area.content: Circa 1517 and 1520. Engraving, only state; sheet (trimmed): 11 5/8 x 8 in. (29.5 x 20.3 cm). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - Rembrandt's Mother
area.content: Circa 1629 and 1633. Etching print and engraving, state ii/iii: 14.9 cm (5.8 in) x 13.2 cm (5.1 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - An Elderly Woman
area.content: Circa 1632-1635. Etching print, intermediate state between ii and iii: 14.9 cm (5.8 in) x 11.7 cm (4.6 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - Ephraim Bueno, Physician
area.content: 1647. Etching print, drypoint print and burin, state ii/ii: 24 cm (9.4 in) x 17.7 cm (6.9 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - Jacob's Ladder
area.content: 1655. Etching print, engraving and drypoint print, state i/iii: 10.9 cm (4.2 in) x 7.1 cm (2.7 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - Landscape with a Cottage and a Large Tree
area.content: 1641. Etching print, wash on paper: 12.9 cm (5 in) x 32 cm (12.5 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - Sheet of Studies
area.content: Circa 1641-1642. Etching print, state i/i: 13.8 cm (5.4 in) x 15.1 cm (5.9 in). SLAM

area.title: Rembrandt van Rijn - The Artist Drawing from a Model
area.content: Circa 1639. Etching print, drypoint print and engraving, state ii/ii: 23.3 cm (9.1 in) x 18.4 cm (7.2 in). SLAM
